daily.today_energy: Your vibe is expansive and curious today. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to explore something you've been putting off. Trust that restless feeling—it's pointing you toward growth.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or flying solo, authenticity is your superpower right now. If you've been holding back how you really feel, today's energy supports speaking your truth. Connection deepens through honesty.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual. This is a solid day to pitch that project or have that conversation you've been rehearsing. Your confidence isn't just vibes—it's backed by real momentum.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, dancing, or something more intense, honor that urge. Your energy thrives when you're actively engaging with the world around you.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are giving you clarity this week, Sag. You're shedding what no longer serves and stepping into your power. Trust the timing—even the slow moments are building something real.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings, but the real magic is in being authentically you. Whether single or coupled, your vibe is magnetic rn. Don't overthink it—just show up as you are.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked. This is the week to pitch that idea or pivot toward something that actually fulfills you. The universe is backing your boldness, so lean in.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and rest in equal measure. Find joy in how your physical self feels rather than chasing goals. Dance, walk, breathe—simple rituals hit different right now.
